  • Primitive Garden Quilt

    I finally got my “Primitive Garden” Quilt finished after about 2.5 years!!! I love everything about this quilt and I am so glad that I took this challenge on, when I had never even done any wool applique projects before!

    Read More

  • Baby Boy Quilt

    Today I have the fun little Baby Boy Quilt that I quilted on my trip to Canada! This was a simple quilt to put together. I did not have a pattern…just cut out 5.5″ squares and put them in a design and added a couple of borders.

    Read More

  • Summer Porch

    Today, I decided that I would take you on a tour of my summer porch. I love this part of my home and I want it to be a welcoming place to all those who come to visit! So, welcome to my summer porch!

    Read More

June 2025 Ministering Handout

May 31, 2025Church, Ministering Handouts, Printables, Quotes"By This All Will Know That You Are My Disciples", Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf quote, free printable card, free printable ministering handout, free printables, June 2025 ministering handout, ministering handout, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day SaintsRita

June 2025 Ministering Handout

Happy June everyone!  Hope all is well in your neck of the woods.  Summer is in full bloom here in Utah.  I have all of my flowers and a small garden planted!  I even have hummingbirds visiting the feeder…life is good!

For the ministering handout this month I chose the talk from Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, titled “By This All Will Know That You Are My Disciples”

This talk is for everyone!  It has already been given in our RS lesson and I have heard it in some of my scripture study podcasts.  I think the message is a great one! (more…)

View all 2 comments

May 2025 Ministering Handout

May 1, 2025Church, Ministering Handouts, Printables, Quotes"Your Repentance Doesn't Burden Jesus Christ; It Brightens His Joy, free printable ministering handouts, free printables, May 2025 ministering handout, ministering handout, printable ministering handout, Sister Tamara W. Runia quote, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day SaintsRita

May 2025 Ministering Handout

Happy May everyone and happy Mother’s Day to all the women out there!  

May is always a busy month with graduations, dance recitals, choir performances, baseball games and just working outside in the yard!  But I love it!

This month for the ministering handout, I chose the talk from Sister Tamara W. Runia, titled, “Your Repentance Doesn’t Burden Jesus Christ; It Brightens His Joy”

If I put both my arms up in the air, do remember her talk?!  She had such a great message, and it spoke to me, and I know a lot of other people!

(more…)

April 2025 Ministering Handout

March 30, 2025Church, Easter, Ministering Handouts, Printables, Quotes"Sunday Will Come", April 2025 ministering handout, Easter handout, Easter printable, Elder Joseph B. Wirthlin quote, free printable ministering handout, free printables, ministering handout, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day SaintsRita

April 2025 Ministering Handout

Happy April everyone! 

Are  you all ready for April Conference for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints?  I am! 

Also, we get to celebrate Easter and all the glorious blessings that the Savior’s resurrection brings.  It is a wonderful time of year!  The weather is getting a little warmer, the spring flowers are all popping up and the sun is shining!

This month, I chose one of my favorite all-time talks about Easter.  It is from Elder Joseph B. Wirthlin, titled , “Sunday Will Come”.

There is such hope in this talk that you can’t help but feel hopeful. (more…)

View all 5 comments

March 2025 Ministering Handout

February 28, 2025Church, Ministering Handouts, Printables, Quotes"The Triumph of Hope", Elder Neil L. Anderson talk, free ministering printables, free printables, March 2025 ministering handout, Neil L Anderson quote, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day SaintsRita

March 2025 Ministering Handout

Happy March everyone!  Hope you are all doing well and looking forward to a wonderful new month!  I am lucky to have you all here and I appreciate your sweet support!

But I am going to be scaling back a little bit now, I will still do the message card as well as a blank card, but I am not going to show a small gift idea unless I have something new and original. As I am a full-time care giver now, I need to scale back a little bit.  Occasionally I will try to give ideas, but I know that you have many ideas of your own.

This month I chose this quote from Neil L Anderson.  It is from his talk last conference, titled, “The Triumph of Hope”:  “As we strengthen our faith in Jesus Christ, we see beyond our struggles to the blessings and promises of eternity. Like a light whose brilliance grows, hope brightens the darkened world, and we see our glorious future.” 

As a caregiver this quote gives me great hope!

(more…)

View all 11 comments

February 2025 Ministering Handouts

Happy February everyone!  Tis the month of Love!

Hope all is well with you, and you are loving yourself and those around you!

For this month I chose the talk, “Love -the Essence of the Gospel” by President Thomas S. Monson. 

(more…)

January 2025 Ministering Handout

Happy New Year Everyone!

Hope your holidays were filled with love and laughter!  Do you love the new year and the thought of organizing everything?  Or is it just me?  I love a new beginning!

Dec 2024 Ministering Handout

December 1, 2024Church, Flowers and Garden, Gift ideas, Ministering Handouts, Printablesamaryllis bulb, Christmas gift idea, Christmas message, Dec 2024 ministering handout, free printable Christmas tags, free printable ministering handout, ministering, printables, rosemary plant, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day SaintsRita

Dec 2024 Ministering Handout

Well, we’ve almost made it through another year!  I love December and all the fun memories and the great reflections on how much the Savior has done for me and my family in this past year.  Hearts turn to Him and to serving others in this wonderful month…and it is beautiful.  May we all open our hearts and let Him in! (more…)

Nov 2024 Ministering Handout

November 1, 2024Church, Fall, Gift ideas, Ministering Handouts, Printables, Quotesautumn ministering handout, free ministering printables, free printables, grateful for you tag, Gratitude, gratitude for a living prophet, ministering gift idea, ministering handout, Nov 2024 ministering handout, President Russell M. Nelson quote, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day SaintsRita

Nov 2024 Ministering Handout

Welcome to the month of Gratitude!  Fall is finally in the air here in Utah and as a result I am a happy camper!

This month I chose gratitude for the theme! 

And I concentrated on being grateful for a living prophet.  I used the prophet’s talk that he just gave in the Oct 2024 General Conference.  It is titled “The Lord Jesus Christ Will Come Again”.   Didn’t you just LOVE this talk?  I am so excited for when the Savior comes again…I just worry about what more we will have to go through before that happens!  But President Nelson assures us that “The Best is Yet to Come!” 

(more…)

Oct 2024 Ministering Handout

Hey everyone!  Happy October!  I love the fall time with the cooler weather and the leaves changing colors and that it is finally sweater weather! 

However, here in Utah…it is not quite sweater weather yet…it has been in the 90’s!!!  But we will get there.

Nelson quote, Sept 2024 ministering handout, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day SaintsRita

Sept 2024 Ministering Handout

Happy September everyone!  Are you ready for fall?  I know I am.  We have had a very hot summer and I am ready for a cool down!  

This month I found a fun little item at Trader Joe’s and knew that I wanted to use it in my ministering handout.  It is gummy Bacon and Eggs…and no they do not taste like bacon and eggs, they are cherry and mango!  They are sooo yummy! (more…)
